entry.title: Programm 6PP2 nicht anlegbar
entry.content:
Hallo Zusammen, wir versuchen analog Hinweis https://me.sap.com/notes/0002368183 das Programm 6PP2 und 6PP3 anzulegen. 6PP3 hatte problemlos funktioniert, aber 6PP2 funktioniert nicht. 

Wir erhalten die Meldung im Anhang und kommen nicht weiter. 

Meldungsnummer: BL001

 

 

Danke und Grüße, Jana Häußler

entry.title: How to regenarate Bill of exchange file FBWE
entry.content:
Hello ,

We have generated Bill of exchange file using FBWE and sent bank . Bank rejected the file because VAT number is missing in customer master data . Then i updated the VAT number in Customer master data . then again generated the file in FBWE but my VAT number still not updated in the payment file .

Can you pls tell me how to regenerate payment file or sholud i reverse bill of exchange ? 

Reversing bill of exchange is looks difficult because we have around 20 payments.

entry.title: Asset Year change
entry.content:
Hi Team,

During the Asset year change system is throwing the program error as attached in the screenshot. Kindly check and advice correct program to change the Asset year.

Thanks & Regards,

Praveen kumar Y

entry.title: Clarification Required on AUC Asset Value Display Before Down Payment Clearing
entry.content:
We require clarification regarding the standard SAP behavior for Asset Under Construction (AUC) procurement involving vendor down payments. We were initially facing an error during the down payment process for an AUC asset. After maintaining the required G/L accounts for transaction types KTANZG (Asset Down Payment Clearing) and KTANZA (Asset Down Payment) in transaction AO90, the error was resolved and the process is now working successfully.

However, during testing, we observed a valuation issue in the asset master and would like to understand whether this is standard SAP behavior.

Test Scenario

  1. Created a Purchase Order for an AUC a

entry.title: I am facing issue with creating the SEPA mandate. Message no SEPA181
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,
I am trying to create a SEPA mandate but it is giving me error as Mandate already exist as SEPA181 . 

But the existing one is CANCELLED status.


What should i check to get rid of this error?
Is there any flag which should be marked as True to make this create?
Please guide me through this.

Thanks in advance Gurus,
Nipun

entry.title: Difference Between AA Reports and GL Reports – AUC BS accounts
entry.content:
We identified a discrepancy between values shown in Asset Accounting (AA) reports and General Ledger (GL) account reports for Assets Under Construction (AuC). After investigation, the difference appears to be related to down payments that are posted to a technical account according to the current configuration.

Issue Description

  • In AA reports, the full amount is displayed under the balance sheet GL account assigned to the AuC.
  • In GL reporting, the postings are shown differently and appear correctly based on the actual posted accounts.
  • This creates a mismatch between AA report balances and GL account report balances.

Investigation and Findings

Our analysis shows that the discrepancy is caused by down payment transactions that are posted to a technical account, as defined in system configuration. In AA reporting, these values are reflected as part of the AuC balance sheet GL account, whereas in GL reporting they remain visible in the technical account where they were actually posted.

Observed Behavior

entry.title: 2PD Provisioning for Doubtful receivable - Perform further valuation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm running the Further Valuation program (F107) for doubtful-receivables provisioning in S/4HANA Cloud, company code 1210, chart of accounts YCOA. The job log fails with:

What I don't understand: account 12401000 is already created in YCOA and extended to company code 1210.

My account determination for transaction key B03 (flat-rate individual value adjustment) is maintained too.

So why does F107 still report the account as "not defined in chart of accounts YCOA" when it clearly exists? Am I missing something in the account determination or in the account's setup?

Any pointers appreciated.

Thanks!

Ahmed

entry.title: Guidance Required to Reduce AUC Asset Balance Due to Vendor Refund
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Prior to SAP Go-Live on 01-Apr-2026, an opening balance of approximately USD 100,000 was uploaded to an Asset Under Construction (AUC) asset as of 31-Mar-2026.

Subsequently, the business received a refund of USD 20,000 related to the capital expenditure. As a result, the business intends to reduce the AUC balance by USD 10,000 from the uploaded opening balance.

Kindly advise on the appropriate SAP process and accounting treatment to reduce the AUC asset value, considering the balance was loaded as part of the pre-Go-Live opening balances.

Please provide the recommended transaction/process along with any configuration or master data prerequisites, if applicable.

entry.title: Management Accounting Certification
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

I just passed the Management Accounting Certification Private Edition, the 2026 new format exam.

If anyone has any questions, or someone wants advice, hit me up.

This post comes as a return to the community after i got valuable information from here in order to pass the exam.

 

Cheerios!

entry.title: F107 - BTE 2750 Not able to change accounts in reversal document
entry.content:
Hi Team,

As part of business requirement we would need to change the accounts for posting for 98 method. for special case like management judgement we need to modify the posting account for open items. We tried using BTE 2750 which helped changing the forward posting and we are not able to change posting in the reversal document

entry.title: Query on report Asset History Report (S_ALR_87011990)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

 

We are currently transferring assets within the same company code using transaction code ABUMN. As a part of the business requirement, we need to change the old cost center to new cost center for the US region. Here business is following bonus depreciation and we need a clarity while doing the asset transfer how the depreciation values to be posted to the new asset.

 

After completing the transfer and posting depreciation, we reviewed the Asset History Report (S_ALR_87011990) for depreciation areas XX with the report date of 31.05.2026. We observed the following:

 

  • Success case -For the another deactivated asset XXXXXX (Company Code XXXX, the report shows a net book value of zero.
  • Failure case - For the deactivated asset XXXXX (Company Code XXXX), the report continues to display a current net book value

entry.title: Need Suggestions for FB60 Mass Upload (Non-PO) – BDC vs BAPI
entry.content:
Need Suggestions for FB60 Mass Upload (Non-PO) – BDC vs BAPI

 

Hi Developers,

 

I have a requirement to develop an FB60 mass Non-PO invoice uploader, where invoices are grouped based on the Reference Number.

 

I have already developed a BDC solution, and the posting process is working correctly. However, I'm facing an issue while capturing messages from the BDC execution.

 

The problem is that even when the transaction encounters an error or warning, the returned message type is sometimes 'S' (Success). Currently, I am filtering based on Message Type and Message ID to identify successfully posted documents, but this approach is not reliable in all scenarios.

 

The business users also want to see detailed error information for records that failed during upload. However, many SAP standard error messages are not user-friendly, making it difficult for end users to understand what went wrong and which field caused the issue also it has a more than 1 line error .

 

A few additional points:

 

- This is a relatively old SAP ECC 6.0 system.

- Before suggesting a BAPI solution, please note that I have already explored BAPI options.

- In my system, automatic tax code calculation is not available.

- The BAPI approach worked only for invoices without tax codes.

- I would also like to avoid manually generating the second line item that FB60 normally creates during manual entry or BDC processing.

 

My questions are:

 

1. How do you reliably identify successful and failed postings in FB60 BDC processing?

2. Is there a better way to capture and present meaningful error messages to users?

3. Has anyone successfully implemented this using a BAPI in an older ECC system, including tax handling?

4. If you have sample code or a working approach (BDC or BAPI), it would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thanks in advance for your suggestions.

entry.title: Issues with CWIP line item
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Our cutover activity date is 31.03.2026. We have CWIP assets where the asset is maintained as an investment measure.

We created Internal Orders using LSMW, with a one-to-one relationship between Internal Orders and Assets (1 Internal Order = 1 Asset). We are able to create the Internal Orders and upload the G/L balances (primary cost postings) without any issues.

However, when we attempt to perform settlement using KO88 or KO8G, we receive the following error message:

"You cannot post to this fixed asset; fiscal year already closed."

In transaction OAAQ, the highest fiscal year is maintained as 2026 and the closed fiscal year is 2025. We are unable to reopen fiscal year 2025.

Could you please advise how we can perform the settlement in fiscal year 2025.Since we are unable to open the fiscal year, we would like to understand the correct approach, as we need to verify the trial balance as of 31.03.2026.

SAP DEV 220 system for testing.

Regards,

entry.title: Expired Useful Life” and “Expired Periods”
entry.content:
We have observed that the fields “Expired Useful Life” and “Expired Periods” are not displayed in the asset master for asset 280036, as the asset was capitalized in the current fiscal year.

However, for asset 280033, these fields are visible since the asset capitalization occurred in prior fiscal years, where depreciation periods have already elapsed.

entry.title: Unable to get ISBP number in DMEE file
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We are configured Brazill DMEE structure but required ISBP code to get into payment file but there is no field available in standard SAP to get into the file. Let us know how to get ISBP number in DMEE file and find the attachment for your reference.

Regards:

Amaresh

entry.title: Need Assistance in Checking the Feasibility of Increasing the Decimal Values.
entry.content:
In transaction code AR29N (Revaluation/New Valuation of Assets), under the tab Index-Based New Valuation, we have a requirement to increase the decimal precision. Currently, the system appears to allow only 2 decimal places.

For example:
Index Value: 10.34321

  However, in the Index for New Valuation of Assets field under the Index Base New Valuation tab, the system only accepts 10.34 instead of 10.34321 which results deviation in expected output.

Could you please provide a solution to increase the decimal count for this field?

 

Thanks & Regards,

Yash K

entry.title: GBP vs USD currency total not matching with exchange rate
entry.content:
Dear Team,

For W102 company code GL account 70502010, there are 38 lineitems.

  • Local Currency (LC1): GBP
  • Local Currency 2 (LC2): USD
  • At the individual line-item level, the calculated exchange rate (USD/GBP) is approximately 1.31, with slight variations due to daily exchange rate fluctuations.

Issue observed:

  1. when we are totaling of 38line items and doing USD/GBP the rate is -8.79, which differs significantly from the line-item exchange rates. 

      2. GBP total -21,150.08 and the USD total in positive 185,929.08,

Please help on above queries.

Excel attached for reference

Regards,

Prasanna.K

entry.title: Translation of Own explanation field in payment terms
entry.content:
We want to maintain the translations in German and Dutch for 'Own Explanation' field in payment terms 

We checked that the Sales Text field translations work when the payment terms is defined for customer. But this does not work for vendor payment terms.

we referred two SAP notes (3427139 and 710252) but could not get the answer.

Request your help.

regards,

entry.title: PO Short Text - Supplier Invoice Line Item Text
entry.content:
Hi,

we are using public cloud and want to copy the text of the purchase order item to the FI supplier invoice line item during posting of the supplier invoice.

This functionality already exists for the goods received posting and is described in the note https://me.sap.com/notes/2921484/en-US.

As we have purchase orders without goods received posting, we would need this functionality also for posting of the supplier invoice.

Does anyone know if this will be a standard feature soon?

BR

entry.title: FBl1 and FBL1n 1000 of layout are missing
entry.content: FBl1 and FBL1n 1000 of user Layout is missing
